_note: Round 5a — synthetic findings to validate the new PDF StrikeOut annotation path. Real specialists rarely emit markup_type='delete' (R3.5 PDF run produced 0), so we hand-craft them against known single-line text in msa_reasoning_test.pdf to exercise the code path.

findings.source_text: one and one-half percent (1.5%) per month
findings.external_comment: Late-fee rate is above buyer's standard cap of 1.0%/month. Recommend striking entirely — interest charges should be addressed in a separate negotiated provision.
Triple-restriction phrasing is duplicative — only the non-exclusive carve-out is buyer-relevant. Strike the over-restrictive transfer/sublicense limits and address them under the assignment clause.
Vendor-favorable absolute-discretion language. Buyer position: strike — modifications must be subject to a reasonableness standard with notice obligations.
Suspension trigger at 30 days is aggressive. Buyer position: strike this clause; suspension rights should require 60+ days plus a notice-and-cure period.
